scope: GSC-only analysis of www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com against the 74-keyword master list (30 snapshots, 2026-05-07 -> 2026-06-17). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are NOT auto-generated here.
wins: Core San Antonio commercial terms hold top-3: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' @1.7, 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' @1.8, 'weight loss counseling san antonio' @2.7, 'bariatric surgery counseling' @2.7 (4 tracked keywords in the #2-3 tier).
'bariatric counseling' is the strongest real mover: position improved ~7.2 to @9.4 on 28 impressions (the highest-impression term in the top tier), now on page 1.
Big positive position swings on commercial-intent terms: 'bariatric counselor' +12.3 to @4.0 (5 imp), 'san antonio bariatric center' +17.3 to @11 (4 imp), 'bariatric therapist' +3.4 to @5.2 (4 imp).
Blog content pulls strong page-1 impressions: hydration post @6.4 with 1,997 imp / 10 clicks; self-esteem post @7.3 with 804 imp; bariatric-surgery psychological-support guide @8.4 with 382 imp.
Clicks ticked up over the window: 2 -> 6 clicks per snapshot from first (05-07) to last (06-17).
needs_attention: Keyword COVERAGE (not pages): 24 of 74 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 50 show none. This is a keyword count, not a page count, and many keywords share one target page. Coverage dipped slightly from 25 to 24 vs the prior run (06-15) - directional only.

Of 49 distinct target pages in the master list, 7 are staging-targeted and 42 are live www. A staging targetUrl is most likely a stale tracker pointer to a page already live (a 06-03 check found most staging-targeted slugs were already live on www), so this is tracker hygiene, not lost traffic - NOT an unpublished-page count.

Visibility trend softened: impressions fell from 2,447 (05-07) to 1,626 (06-17) and impression-weighted avg position drifted from 14.87 to 17.12. Caveat: many tracked terms sit on 1-6 impressions, so single-impression positions swing day to day and are directional only.

CTR is near zero: 6 clicks on 1,626 impressions (~0.4%) this snapshot. High-impression blog posts barely convert - medications post 1,092 imp -> 1 click, hydration post 1,997 imp -> 10 clicks (~0.5%).

Commercial terms with real impressions slipped: 'weight loss therapy' -6.7 to @13.7 (7 imp), 'weight loss counseling or therapy' -6.3 to @10.0 (5 imp), 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' -2.0 to @12.8 (15 imp).
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: repoint the 7 staging targetUrls in keywords-master.json (bariatric-counseling-near-me, eating-disorder-therapist-near-me, intuitive-eating-support-in-mcallen-tx, san-antonio-bariatric-center, weight-loss-counseling-or-therapy, what-is-a-bariatric-counselor, what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor) to their correct live www URLs so GSC can match them.

Fix CTR: add clear CTAs and internal links from the top-impression blog posts (hydration @6.4 / 1,997 imp, medications @9.6 / 1,092 imp, self-esteem @7.3 / 804 imp) into the matching San Antonio service pages.
On-page refresh for the slipped commercial terms - 'weight loss therapy', 'weight loss counseling or therapy', and 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' - to defend page-1/borderline positions.
Defend the core local #2-3 cluster (bariatric counseling san antonio, bariatric surgery counseling) with fresh internal links and on-page reinforcement.

Add/verify FAQ schema on key service pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility. If a staging->prod publish backlog is suspected, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes - do not infer a count from keyword/GSC data.
summary: BCC holds the core San Antonio bariatric terms in the top 3 and 'bariatric counseling' jumped onto page 1 (@9.4, 28 imp), but overall impressions and avg position softened over the window and CTR is ~0.4%, so the next moves are tracker hygiene on 7 stale staging pointers, internal-link/CTA fixes from high-impression blog posts, and on-page refreshes for the few slipped commercial terms. Scope is GSC-only; competitor and AI-visibility remain manual.
